channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NSSF encourages employers to take advantage of penalty waiver
item.description: The National Social Security Fund (NSSF) has called on employers to capitalize on the penalty waiver initiative aimed at reducing financial burdens related to social security contributions. Published ...

item.title: Iran's Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni Arrives in Pakistan for High-Level Talks
item.description: Iran's Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni has arrived in Pakistan alongside a high-level delegation, according to Iranian media reports. Upon his arrival, Pakistan's Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi welc...

item.title: Kenyan Content Creator Shares Candid Breast Reduction Surgery Experience
item.description: Kenyan content creator Online Bestie has shared an unfiltered vlog documenting her breast reduction surgery, offering followers a rare look at the procedure. The TikToker filmed her entire experience,...

item.title: LHC Protects Wife’s Dower Rights in Cases of Husband’s Misconduct
item.description: The Lahore High Court (LHC) has ruled that a wife's right to her deferred dower (Haq Mehr) remains protected if marriage dissolution occurs due to the husband's cruelty or misconduct, even if the fami...

item.title: Trump Threatens Tariffs on Canada Over Wildfire Smoke Impacting U.S. Air Quality
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has publicly criticized Prime Minister Mark Carney over the impact of wildfire smoke on American air quality, threatening financial penalties on Canada. During a joint appe...

item.title: Japanese mayor takes maternity leave, highlighting gender gap in politics
item.description: Shoko Kawata, mayor of Yawata in western Japan, became the first sitting mayor to take maternity leave, sparking debate on gender equality in politics. The 33-year-old mayor, who became Japan's younge...

item.title: SERAP calls for withdrawal of controversial digital regulation bill in Nigeria
item.description: The article discusses how the Social and Economic Rights Action Centre (SERAP) has strongly opposed a proposed bill that would require technology companies operating in Nigeria to establish physical o...

item.title: Trump's Approval Rating Hits Record Low in Second Term, Experts Warn of Further Decline
item.description: CNN analyst Harry Enten warns that President Donald Trump's approval ratings have reached the lowest levels ever recorded for a second-term president, with net approval standing at -22. This surpasses...

item.title: DOGE's Legacy Lingers in Government Amid Cost-Cutting Efforts
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing impact of Elon Musk's cost-cutting initiatives at the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), which was intended to dissolve by July 4, 2026. Despite its supposed...

item.title: Three herders killed, two injured in Plateau attack
item.description: Three herders were killed and two others injured in an ambush attack in the Tanjol community of Riyom Local Government Area, Plateau State. The victims were grazing their cattle when gunmen ambushed t...

item.title: Kambua Shares Story of Father's Blindness and Healing Journey
item.description: Gospel singer Kambua has opened up about her father's experience of losing his eyesight completely during a healing crusade at Uhuru Park. The story, shared during an interview with JCC Lady Bishop Al...

item.title: New British Prime Minister Andy Burnham outlines plans to end political instability and economic challenges
item.description: Andy Burnham, the newly appointed Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, has pledged to break from past political instability and introduce a new economic model to address the nation's challenges. His ...

item.title: Spain vs Argentina in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final: Global Spectatorship
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup concluded with a global spectacle as fans from Sydney to the Gaza Strip gathered to witness Spain's clash against Argentina. The final match, held on Monday, brought together m...

item.title: Calgary Experiences Sunny and Seasonal Weather to Start the Work Week
item.description: The article highlights Calgary's weather conditions at the beginning of the work week, noting a sunny and seasonally appropriate start. It mentions that temperatures are within typical ranges for this...

item.title: Middle-Aged Women Find Mental Health Benefits Through Rave Culture
item.description: A growing number of middle-aged women are turning to rave culture as a source of mental health relief, according to a study highlighting the therapeutic benefits of electronic dance music (EDM) events...

item.title: South Africa's Migration Policies: Separating Fact from Fiction
item.description: The article examines common misconceptions about migrants in South Africa, challenging claims that they disproportionately commit crimes or strain public services. Data from the Institute for Security...

item.title: NSSF Encourages Employers to Utilize Penalty Waiver
item.description: The National Social Security Fund (NSSF) has called on employers in Tanzania to take advantage of a penalty waiver initiative aimed at easing financial burdens. This move comes as part of broader effo...

item.title: UDOM Lecturer Detained Over Alleged Demonstration Encouragement, University Unaware
item.description: The Dodoma Regional Police have confirmed the detention of University of Dodoma (UDOM) lecturer Melkisedeki Kaijage, who is currently in custody pending investigations into allegations of encouraging ...

item.title: Delhi Police Use Lathi Charges and Tear Gas Against CJP Protesters Demanding Education Minister Resignation
item.description: In Delhi, the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) organized a protest demanding the resignation of Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan over alleged mismanagement of competitive exams. Thousands gather...

item.title: Website Access Issue: Bot Detection Error Encountered
item.description: The article discusses an error message encountered by users attempting to access a website, indicating they may have been detected as a crawler bot. News Corp Australia employs software to manage craw...
